message:
test(wave-69): trait coverage for lab/scenario, lab/conformal, obligation/marking, obligation/recovery

16 new tests covering Debug/Clone/Copy/Default/PartialEq/Eq derives across
NetworkPreset, ChaosSection, FaultAction, ValidationError, ConformalConfig,
ConformityScore, ThresholdMode, CoverageTracker, MarkingDimension,
ObligationMarking, MarkingTimeline, AnalysisStats, RecoveryConfig,
RecoveryPhase, RecoveryAction, RecoveryTickResult.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
